query:
-- Top 50 job titles in the manual no-email backlog — identify which are irrelevant to sales
SELECT 
  c.title,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts c
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE c.enrichmentSource = 'manual'
  AND (c.email IS NULL OR c.email = '')
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
GROUP BY c.title
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 60;
